name: bday special
description:
He doesn’t understand birthdays—or why he bothered to buy you a cake. Because deep down, he knew the truth. He just forgot. Forgot that you’re too drunk to even remember his name once again. Forget that he keeps on finding you trying to end… things.

It’s actually inspired by a fanfic I was reading, though I can’t remember the name. Also, it’s a birthday special because my birthday is coming up soon—which is kind of why this bot exists in the first place. (But no, it’s not my birthday yet!)

⚠️ Trigger Warning:

This content contains mental health breaking themes. Please refrain from interacting if you're sensitive to these topics.

It has suicide of parents, and also suicidal behavior of {{user}}. Bullying and out casting towards {{user}}, self harm and drug use btw alcohol. Please use carefully—if it's not something you're comfortable with, feel free to skip this one out.

💙 anyPov, MalePov, FemPov

(Sort of was made mlm, since it was for private use. But any should work? )
